reason: Verified that the SuperAgent browser-use feature successfully opens a browser, navigates to a URL, and returns the page title to the user.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the SuperAgent homepage with the agent list visible in the sidebar.
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260527-223349-q36n" agent in the sidebar - Successfully opened the agent chat interface with a message input field.
Step 3: Typed and sent the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message was successfully sent and appeared in the chat view.

Step 4: Waited for the agent response (up to 3 minutes) - The agent completed the task in 10 seconds. It executed three tool calls in sequence: ToolSearch, Open Browser https://example.com, and Browser MCP: Browser Get State.

Step 5: Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" - The agent correctly reported: "The page title is "Example Domain"." The live browser preview panel on the right confirms the page was successfully loaded, showing the Example Domain IANA placeholder page.
